title: Duration only adds up to its dependencies, and doesnt subtract
excerpt:
I have a project management board, were the different tasks are dependent on each other. But when i change in the duration time, it only adds up, and doesnt subtract from the timeline. 
Ex. If i set duration to 10 days, …

posts.author: YKarim (Yussef)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a project management board, were the different tasks are dependent on each other. But when i change in the duration time, it only adds up, and doesnt subtract from the timeline.

Ex. If i set duration to 10 days, the dependent task changes with 10 days aswell, but if i afterwards change the duration to a smaller number of days, ex. 5 days, then the dependencies stay unchanged.
